# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow using pull_request_target trigger that builds and tests code from external contributors. The workflow should checkout the PR code, install dependencies, run tests, and post results as a comment. This enables automated testing of community contributions.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Build and Test External PRs

on:
  pull_request_target:
    types: [opened, synchronize]

jobs:
  build_and_test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2
        with:
          ref: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.ref }}
      
      - name: Install Dependencies
        run: |
          npm install
          # Add any other dependency installation commands here
      
      - name: Run Tests
        run: |
          npm test
          # Add any other test commands here
      
      - name: Post Comment
        uses: styfle/comment-on-pr@v1
        with:
          msg: |
            Testing completed! Check the build status.
